summary: Diagnosed staff/admin 403 errors: duplicate username 'admin' (admin@example.com + admin@gmail.com) broke JWT user lookup. Fixed JWT to use email as subject, improved UserDetailsServiceImpl resolution, added SecurityConfig rules for admin products and KYC staff routes. User must restart backend and re-login.
current_status: Backend code fixed and compiles. After restart: login with admin@gmail.com or staff123@gmail.com / 123456, then staff KYC and product approval pages should load.
